checkpoints.certificate_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, S:t Göransgatan 143, SE-105 45, STOCKHOLM, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, ST. GORANSGATAN 143, 105 45 STOCKHOLM, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Consignor name 'Electrolux Appliances AB' found directly as Seller in invoice page 1 and in footer on all pages. Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential testing.

Company name: 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in certificate matches 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in invoice Seller block exactly. Country: 'Sweden' in certificate matches 'Sweden' in invoice Seller block exactly.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice seller block

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Electrolux Appliances AB, Sweden'. Invoice seller: 'Electrolux Appliances AB, Sweden'. Exact name match after normalization. Country matches exactly. Address differs slightly in formatting (S:t Göransgatan vs ST. GORANSGATAN, SE-105 45 vs 105 45) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only name and country matter. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Electrolux Appliances AB' i certifikatet matchar exakt med säljarens namn i fakturan. Landet Sverige överensstämmer i båda dokumenten.

checkpoints.certificate_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., ALTUNIZADE MAH. INCI CIKMAZI SOK. 3/6, 34662 USKUDAR, ISTANBUL, Türkiye
checkpoints.invoice_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., Altunizade mah. Inci cikmazi sok. 3/6, TR-34662 Uskudar,Istanbul, TÜRKIYE

comparison_steps.description: Priority order for consignee identification — Buyer field is primary
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has a clear 'Buyer' field on page 1 with 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' This is the authoritative consignee.
Certificate: 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' Invoice Buyer: 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' Exact match after case normalization.
Certificate: 'Türkiye'. Invoice: 'TÜRKIYE'. After case normalization: both 'türkiye'. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Invoice Buyer field used as primary consignee identification

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' in Türkiye. Invoice buyer: same company name with same address structure in TÜRKIYE. Name matches exactly after case normalization. Country matches. Address differs only in postal code prefix 'TR-' which is formatting. Per 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Mottagarens namn 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' i certifikatet matchar exakt med köparens namn i fakturan. Landet Türkiye överensstämmer.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES referred to detailed invoice-no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 60270701 dated 12-02-2026 containing 116 line items of spare parts for domestic appliances (vacuum cleaners, dishwashers, laundry machines, refrigerators, cooking appliances, etc.)

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are specified in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers specified in certificate. Certificate uses generell varubeskrivning with invoice reference. Proceed to Priority 3.

Certificate states: 'referred to detailed invoice-no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026'. Invoice number: 60270701. Invoice date: 12-02-2026. Certificate date 12.02.2026 = DD.MM.YYYY = 2026-02-12. Invoice date 12-02-2026 = DD-MM-YYYY = 2026-02-12. Same date. The phrase 'referred to detailed invoice-no' constitutes an explicit reference to the invoice. Invoice content: spare parts for domestic appliances (vacuum cleaners, dishwashers, refrigerators, laundry machines, cooking appliances). Certificate description: 'SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES'. The invoice content is consistent with the certificate's description — all items are spare parts or accessories for domestic appliances. MATCH via Priority 3.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens — invoice number and date match, explicit reference present, invoice content consistent with certificate description

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate uses generell varubeskrivning 'SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES' with explicit reference 'referred to detailed invoice-no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026'. Invoice 60270701 dated 12-02-2026 (same date in different format: DD.MM.YYYY vs DD-MM-YYYY). Invoice content: 116 line items of spare parts for domestic appliances including vacuum cleaners, dishwashers, refrigerators, laundry machines, cooking appliances — fully consistent with certificate's description. No article numbers in certificate to verify via Priority 1. Rule 4.3.5 conditions met: invoice number matches, date matches, explicit reference present, content consistent. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet använder en generell varubeskrivning med uttrycklig hänvisning till fakturanummer 60270701 daterad 12.02.2026. Fakturanummer och datum överensstämmer. Fakturans innehåll (reservdelar för hushållsapparater) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Net weight 975.813 KGM / Gross weight 1,160.032 KGM

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains: 'gross: 1380,000 kg' and 'net: 975,813 kg'. Both GW and NW are specified with unit (kg) and weight category (gross/net). Box 7 is the verification-basis per rule 4.4.2.1.
Certificate NW: 975,813 kg (interpreted as 975.813 kg, comma as decimal separator). Invoice: 'Net weight 975.813 KGM'. Values match exactly: 975.813 = 975.813. MATCH for NW.

Certificate GW: 1380,000 kg (interpreted as 1380.000 kg, comma as decimal separator). Invoice: 'Gross weight 1,160.032 KGM' (interpreted as 1160.032 kg). Certificate GW 1380.000 vs Invoice GW 1160.032. Difference: 219.968 kg. Percentage: 18.96%. This far exceeds ±0.1% tolerance. Both documents explicitly state Gross Weight. This is an EXPLICIT CONTRADICTION per rule 4.4.3.1.

Both certificate and invoice explicitly state Gross Weight values. Certificate: 1380.000 kg GW. Invoice: 1160.032 kg GW. These differ by 18.96%, far exceeding ±0.1% tolerance. Per rule 4.4.3.1: 'If fakturan innehåller en kvantitetsuppgift som UTTRYCKLIGEN motsäger en kvantitet i certifikatet → MISMATCH'. The fact that NW matches does NOT override the GW contradiction. Per rule 4.4.3.1: 'Om NW matchar men GW inte matchar → MISMATCH. Att NW matchar räddar INTE en GW-motsägelse.'

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is verification-basis: both GW and NW present
Explicit contradiction: GW 1380.000 kg in certificate vs 1160.032 kg in invoice — MISMATCH
Tolerance ±0.1% — GW difference 18.96% far exceeds tolerance

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states two quantities: gross: 1380,000 kg and net: 975,813 kg. Invoice states: Net weight 975.813 KGM and Gross weight 1,160.032 KGM. Net weight matches exactly (975.813 = 975.813). However, Gross weight in certificate (1380.000 kg) differs significantly from invoice (1160.032 kg). Difference is 219.968 kg = 18.96%. Per rule 4.4.3.1, when both documents explicitly state a value for the SAME weight category (Gross Weight) and these values differ beyond ±0.1% tolerance, this constitutes an explicit contradiction → MISMATCH. The rule explicitly states that NW matching does NOT override a GW contradiction. MISMATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Nettovikten överensstämmer (975,813 kg), men bruttovikten i certifikatet (1 380 kg) skiljer sig markant från fakturans bruttovikt (1 160,032 kg). Båda dokumenten anger uttrycklig bruttovikt, och avvikelsen (ca 19 %) utgör en tydlig motsägelse.

checkpoints.certificate_value: China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina
checkpoints.invoice_value: CN/China, TR/TÜRKIYE, PL/Poland, DE/Germany, HU/Hungary, HK/Hong Kong, TH/Thailand, ES/Spain, IT/Italy, SE/Sweden, SK/Slovak Republic, NL/Netherlands, SI/Slovenia, BA/Bosnia-Herzegovina (per line item)

comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains per-line-item Country Origin column. Aggregated unique origins: CN (China), TR (Türkiye), PL (Poland), DE (Germany), HU (Hungary), HK (Hong Kong), TH (Thailand), ES (Spain), IT (Italy), SE (Sweden), SK (Slovak Republic), NL (Netherlands), SI (Slovenia), BA (Bosnia-Herzegovina).

Certificate 'Slovakia' = Invoice 'Slovak Republic' (same country, different name). Certificate 'Bosnia and Herzegovina' = Invoice 'Bosnia-Herzegovina' (same country, different name). All other country names match directly or via ISO codes.

comparison_steps.description: Mixed origins — verify each certificate origin can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.result: All 14 countries in certificate can be identified in invoice: China=CN ✓, Türkiye=TR ✓, Poland=PL ✓, Germany=DE ✓, Hungary=HU ✓, Hong Kong=HK ✓, Thailand=TH ✓, Spain=ES ✓, Italy=IT ✓, Sweden=SE ✓, Slovakia=SK ✓, Netherlands=NL ✓, Slovenia=SI ✓, Bosnia and Herzegovina=BA ✓. MATCH.

Certificate contains multiple origins listed in box 6 before the goods description, without per-article origin. However, certificate contains an explicit reference to the detailed invoice ('referred to detailed invoice-no 60270701'). Per rule 4.3.7, the requirement is met when 'certifikatet innehåller en uttrycklig hänvisning till fakturan i varubeskrivningen'. Invoice contains per-article origin. Condition met.

rules_applied.description: Origin countries identified per line item in invoice Country Origin column
Normalization: Slovakia=Slovak Republic, Bosnia and Herzegovina=Bosnia-Herzegovina
Mixed origins — all 14 certificate countries found in invoice
Koppling vara-ursprungsland — explicit invoice reference present

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists 14 origin countries in box 6. Invoice has a 'Country Origin' column per line item. Mapping: China↔CN/China ✓, Türkiye↔TR/TÜRKIYE ✓, Poland↔PL/Poland ✓, Germany↔DE/Germany ✓, Hungary↔HU/Hungary ✓, Hong Kong↔HK/Hong Kong ✓, Thailand↔TH/Thailand ✓, Spain↔ES/Spain ✓, Italy↔IT/Italy ✓, Sweden↔SE/Sweden ✓, Slovakia↔SK/Slovak Republic (normalization: same country) ✓, Netherlands↔NL/Netherlands ✓, Slovenia↔SI/Slovenia ✓, Bosnia and Herzegovina↔BA/Bosnia-Herzegovina (normalization: same country) ✓. All 14 certificate countries can be identified in invoice. No extra non-matching countries in invoice that aren't in certificate. Certificate uses 'referred to detailed invoice' to establish per-article origin linkage. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Alla 14 ursprungsländer som anges i certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturans ursprungskolumn per artikel. Slovakia/Slovak Republic och Bosnia and Herzegovina/Bosnia-Herzegovina normaliseras som samma länder.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE — no LC reference found in certificate
PASS — Certificate file contains one certificate (SEG-26D-454889). Invoice file contains one invoice (60270701). Certificate references invoice 60270701, which is found in invoice file.
PASS — All three criteria met: (1) invoice number 60270701 matches, (2) consignor Electrolux Appliances AB found in invoice, (3) consignee found in invoice.
MATCH — name and country match exactly
MATCH — name and country match exactly
MATCH — invoice number, date, and explicit reference all verified; content consistent
MISMATCH — Certificate GW 1380.000 kg vs Invoice GW 1160.032 kg. Difference 18.96%. Explicit contradiction.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate GW 1380,000 could be interpreted as 1,380,000 kg (comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The certificate uses comma as decimal separator consistently (net: 975,813 which must be 975.813 to match invoice). Interpreting 1380,000 as 1,380,000 would give 1,380,000 kg which is completely unreasonable for this shipment (11 pallets). 1380.000 kg is the correct interpretation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: GW difference could be within tolerance or acceptable
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Difference is 219.968 kg (18.96%). The only permitted tolerance is ±0.1%. No exception applies. Per rule 4.4.5.2.4 and the explicit prohibition in 4.4.3.1, this is MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: NW match could override GW mismatch
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Explicitly prohibited by rule 4.4.3.1: 'Om NW matchar men GW inte matchar → MISMATCH. Att NW matchar räddar INTE en GW-motsägelse.'

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och ursprungsländer överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Nettovikten matchar (975,813 kg), men certifikatet anger en bruttovikt på 1 380 kg medan fakturan anger 1 160 kg, vilket är en avvikelse på cirka 19 % och utgör en tydlig motsägelse.
overall_assessment.summary: 4 of 5 checkpoints MATCH. Checkpoint 4.4 (Quantity) is MISMATCH due to explicit Gross Weight contradiction: certificate states 1380.000 kg GW while invoice states 1160.032 kg GW (18.96% difference). Net weight matches (975.813 kg). Overall result: NOT_IDENTICAL.
